headline: 4 Industrial Stocks Set to Outshine Q1 Earnings Estimates
summary: Four industrial stocks, Stanley Black, Illinois Tool, Parker-Hannifin and Hubbell. are poised to beat Q1 earnings, driven by strong end-market demand and pricing gains.

headline: Earnings Preview: Tennant (TNC) Q1 Earnings Expected to Decline
summary: Tennant (TNC) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Parker-Hannifin (PH) Q3 Earnings Preview: What You Should Know Beyond the Headline Estimates
summary: Besides Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates for Parker-Hannifin (PH), review projections for some of its key metrics to gain a deeper understanding of how the company might have fared during the quarter ended March 2026.
